revision.text: <includeonly>{{#ifexist:Template:country data {{{1|}}} |{{country data {{{1|}}}|flaglist/core{{#ifeq:{{{table|}}}|yes|table}}|name={{#ifeq:{{{short|}}}|yes|<!--empty to signal usage of shortname alias-->|{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{{1|}}}}}<!--if name is given but left empty then use 1-->}}|variant={{{variant|{{{2|}}}}}}|size={{{size|}}}}}<!-- -->|{{flaglist/core{{#ifeq:{{{table|}}}|yes|table}}|alias={{{1|}}}|name={{{name|{{{1|}}}}}}|size={{{size|}}}|flag alias=Flag placeholder.svg|border=}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#ifexist:Template:country data {{{1|}}} |{{country data {{{1|}}}|flaglist/core{{#ifeq:{{{table|}}}|yes|table}}|name={{#ifeq:{{{short|}}}|yes|<!--empty to signal usage of shortname alias-->|{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{{1|}}}}}<!--if name is given but left empty then use 1-->}}|variant={{{variant|{{{2|}}}}}}|size={{{size|}}}}}<!-- -->|{{flaglist/core{{#ifeq:{{{table|}}}|yes|table}}|alias={{{1|}}}|name={{{name|{{{1|}}}}}}|size={{{size|}}}|flag alias=Flag placeholder.svg|border=}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#ifexist:Template:country data {{{1|}}} |{{country data {{{1|}}}|flaglist/core{{#ifeq:{{{table|}}}|yes|table}}|name={{#ifeq:{{{short|}}}|yes|<!--empty to signal usage of shortname alias-->|{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{{1|}}}}}<!--if name is given but left empty then use 1-->}}|variant={{{variant|{{{2|}}}}}}|size={{{size|}}}}}<!-- -->|{{flaglist/core{{#ifeq:{{{table|}}}|yes|table}}|alias={{{1|}}}|name={{{name|{{{1|}}}}}}|size={{{size|}}}|flag alias=Flag placeholder.svg|border=}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Flaglist here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Flaglist for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly>{{#ifexist:Template:country data {{{1|}}} |{{country data {{{1|}}}|flaglist/core{{#ifeq:{{{table|}}}|yes|table}}|name={{#ifeq:{{{short|}}}|yes|<!--empty to signal usage of shortname alias-->|{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{{1|}}}}}<!--if name is given but left empty then use 1-->}}|variant={{{variant|{{{2|}}}}}}|size={{{size|}}}}}<!-- -->|{{flaglist/core{{#ifeq:{{{table|}}}|yes|table}}|alias={{{1|}}}|name={{{name|{{{1|}}}}}}|size={{{size|}}}|flag alias=Flag placeholder.svg|border=}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Flaglist for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly>{{#ifexist:Template:country data {{{1|}}} |{{country data {{{1|}}}|flaglist/core{{#ifeq:{{{table|}}}|yes|table}}|name={{#ifeq:{{{short|}}}|yes||{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{{1|}}}}}}}|variant={{{variant|{{{2|}}}}}}|size={{{size|}}}}}|{{flaglist/core{{#ifeq:{{{table|}}}|yes|table}}|alias={{{1|}}}|name={{{name|{{{1|}}}}}}|size={{{size|}}}|flag alias=Flag placeholder.svg|border=}}}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
